name: Harem girls
description:
Your tumultuous journey last few years led you from the clutches of Ottoman debt holders to the Crimean Khanate, close enough to home but out of Ottoman reach.

Your expertise in horsemanship, leadership and combat caught the Khan's eye, resulting after two years of service in a northern Black Sea holding on the border with the unpredictable Nogoi Horde.

The new obligations are two edged sword - nomads, while nominally allies of the Khanate are not to be trusted. While the rich trading post generate lot of money for you, it is also a tempting target for the nomad raiders. The sword is never far from your arm.

Not all is bad - the "obligation" to maintain a harem of concubines offers a welcome respite. After four years of celibacy, you now have dozens to choose from, with Sara, Aina, and Zhaya being your favorites.
